I

IN_PREPARATION - Enum constant in enum class order.OrderState
 
increaseNumExchanges() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Increases the number of exchanges by 1
increaseNumExchanges(int) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Increases the number of exchanges
increaseNumOrders() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Increase the number of orders by 1
increaseNumOrders(int) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Increases the number of orders
increaseRevenue(double) - Method in class product.Category
It increases the category's revenue when a product belonging to it is sold
increaseSales(int, LocalDate) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
Increases the number of sales by a certain number
increaseSales(LocalDate) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
Increases the number of sales by one
increaseStock() - Method in class product.Pack
Increases the stock of the products included in the pack
increaseStock(int) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It increases the stock a certain value
isAvailable() - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Obtains if the product is available
isCategoryInStore(String) - Method in class store.Store
Obtains whether a category exists in the store
isExchanged() - Method in class exchange.Exchange
Obtains if the exchange was done
isPaidValuation() - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Obtains if the valuations is paid
isVisible() - Method in class notification.Notification
Obtains whether the user has erased this notification
